title: October 12
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}

'''October 12''' is the 285th day of the year (286th in leap years). There are 80 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1974]] – [[Pablo Hidalgo]] is born.
*[[1979]] – ''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]'' published.
*[[1982]] – ''[[The Jedi Master's Quizbook]]'' published.
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 17|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 17]] published.
*[[1985]] – "[[The New King]]" of [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars Droids'']] airs on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*1985 – "[[The Tree of Light]]" of [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] airs on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*1985 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 121|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 121]] published.
*[[2000]] – [[Willow (film)#Shadow Star|''Shadow Star'']] published.
*[[2004]] – ''[[Heir to the Empire]]'', ''[[The Last Command]]'', ''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'', ''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]'', and ''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' abridged cassettes re-released.
*[[2005]] – [[Empire 36|''Empire'' 36]] published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[The Making of The Empire Strikes Back]]'' published.
*2010 – ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II]]'' demo is released.
*[[2011]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Strange Allies]]'' published.
*2011 – [[Invasion: Revelations 4|''Invasion: Revelations'' 4]] published.
*2011 – ''[[The Old Republic—The Lost Suns 5]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – [[Darth Vader (2015) 25|''Darth Vader'' (2015) 25]] published.
*2016 – [[Han Solo 4|''Han Solo'' 4]] published.
*2016 – [[The Force Awakens Adaptation 5|''The Force Awakens Adaptation'' 5]] published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi Manga]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars: These Are the Droids You're Looking For]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Ronin: A Visions Novel]]'' published.
*2021 – [[Ronin: A Visions Novel (audiobook)|''Ronin: A Visions Novel'' audiobook]] released.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: The Secrets of the Sith]]'' published.
*[[2022]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 28|''Star Wars'' (2020) 28]] published.
*2022 – [[Visions 1|''Visions'' 1]] published.
*2022 – [[The High Republic (2022) 1|''The High Republic'' (2022) 1]] published.
*2022 – "[[The Eye]]" is released on Disney+.
<noinclude>
